runSelectionRule: Latest 77 win=true, ascension=10, character=CHARACTER.REGENT .run files under history-dashen; .run.backup files ignored.
simulatorImplementationRule: schema v2: full means the current-source regenerated simulation card form has no warning beginning with "Unsupported simulation action"; partial means the form is recognized and simulated with static/resource fields but at least one parsed action is not dynamically modeled; missing means no simulation library entry exists. Weak-only effects are modeled by the simulator's accepted static Weak approximation and are not marked partial.
scope: After applying map-point history through floor 8, including floor-8 rewards/events.
